reason_detail: To increase diversity, mutation probability was raised from 0.1 to 0.18 (within allowed step and bounds) to encourage exploration, while crossover probability was slightly reduced from 0.9 to 0.82 to balance genetic variation. Repair probability was decreased modestly from 1.0 to 0.92 to allow a small fraction of less-repaired (thus more diverse) offspring, while still maintaining high feasibility. Parameters unsupported by capabilities (eta_c, eta_m, local_search_prob) remain null.

To further increase diversity after partial recovery, mutation probability is increased by 0.08 (within max_step) to promote exploration, while crossover probability is reduced by 0.08 to limit exploitation. Repair probability is slightly decreased to allow more un-repaired (and potentially diverse) offspring to survive. Unsupported parameters (eta_c, eta_m, local_search_prob) remain null per capabilities.

To increase convergence as requested, mutation probability was reduced from 0.26 to 0.18 (within allowed bounds and step size) to limit disruptive exploration and preserve high-quality building blocks. Crossover probability was increased from 0.74 to 0.82 to enhance exploitation through recombination of elite solutions. Repair probability remains unchanged at 0.84 since feasibility is already perfect and the operator is supported. Parameters eta_c, eta_m, and local_search_prob are unsupported per capabilities and thus kept null.
